name: Moist Spiced Apple Scones
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C). Lightly grease a large baking sheet with nonstick cooking spray.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, brown sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, ginger, and salt.
Using a pastry blender or fork, cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Stir in the chopped dried apples.
In a small bowl, combine the applesauce, buttermilk, and egg. Mix well.
Add to the dry ingredients; stir just until moistened (the dough will be sticky).
Place the dough on the prepared baking sheet. With wet fingers, shape it into an 8-inch circle about 3/4 inch thick.
In a small bowl, mix together the granulated sugar and cinnamon for sprinkling over the top of the dough.
Using a sharp knife, cut the dough into 8 wedges, making cuts about 1/4 inch deep.
Bake for 18 to 22 minutes, or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cut into wedges and serve warm.
